text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, Tamamo Cross and I are strolling
through the shopping district, munching on
croquette​s, when...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh, what's goin' on over there? They've got a
huge crowd...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! You there,
the li'l girl in the back! Care to give it a spin?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, who ya callin' "li'l girl"?! I'm not some kiddo,
ya know!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Seriously though, Mister, ya got some guts callin'
on me. I hope your jaw's ready to hit the floor
'cause I'm takin' every prize ya got!
choice_data_list: We've only got one ticket, though...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What?! Just one?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well, whatever. Let's nab the best prize and put
some tears in this raffle fella's eyes.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Trainer. Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We pull the lever together and spin the tumbler
at lightning speed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What the—it's just some ticket? I was hopin' for
some food...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wait whaaaaat?! Hot springs?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Y-you're joking...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Seriously? A hot spring vacation?!
choice_data_list:
What, would you've preferred a cold spring
vacation?

What, would you've preferred a cold spring
vacation?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Can it, idiot! I'm the one with the comebacks!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But... wh-what am I s'posed to do with this? I went
and won the grand prize...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But I haven't got the slightest clue what to do
with it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her tough talk earlier, Tamamo Cross
ends up putting tears in her own eyes.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I used to beg and beg for a hot spring trip when I
was a kid, but I never got to go...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What am I s'pposed to do now? I can't accept
this...
choice_data_list: Should we give it back, then?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Heck no! We struck gold here.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wait! Why don't you hold onto the tickets for
me?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And then I can win it back. Nothin' wrong with a
winner earnin' a free trip, right? That's what they
do in the comedy grand prix!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It'll be my reward when I dominate the Twinkle
Series. Not bad, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Awesome, it's a deal then! Boy... Me, goin' on a hot spring vacay? Is Lady Luck finally lookin' my way?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, I can't start countin' my chickens
yet. I gotta work real hard if I'm gonna cash out
my prize!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Snapping back to reality, Tamamo Cross pumps
herself up. Her desire to win is as steaming hot as
the soothing baths she dreams of visiting.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, I just won the mother of all burgers! I'm
eatin' good today!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But it is kinda funny-lookin'. It's got a big ol'
carrot pokin' out of it...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Why'd they go stabbin' a veggie into the meat,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A carrot... stabbed into the steak... steak... Stake!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Staked the... They staked the steak...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Bwahahaha! There's no way that's the reason—or it'd mean there's someone servin' up puns as bad as yours!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Phew... All that jokin' around's got me starvin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Let's take this 'n head back to the dorms! We're
havin' ourselves a feast!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We enjoy a jolly dinner as we pick away at the
deluxe carrot hamburger steak we won.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whoooa, all these carrots are for us? Now that's what I'm talkin' about!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
This portion's HUGE... It's freakin'
mountain-sized! And "mountain-sized" is one of
my favorite words!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yep. Right up there with "half off" and "bargain."

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Okay, so I'm thinkin' we split 'em and send half to
my fam.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'll write 'em a little note like, "Check what I won
in a raffle!" They'll love it.
choice_data_list: Why not send a photo to go with the letter?
Why not send a photo to go with the letter?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ooh, yeah! Nice idea!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: All right, huddle up 'n bust out your pearly whites!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross throws up a peace sign in front of
the carrots. I later find out that her siblings loved
the photo.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Just one plain old carrot?! Whatta joke!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But I guess it'll do. Don't matter how much of it ya
got—food is food.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I've been let down worse than this. If I had to say,
the worst prize I ever got was... Ugh.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I got a consolation prize when I was a kid. There I
was, all starvin' 'n stuff, when the raffle clerk
goes, "Congrats, kiddo! Here's yer necklace!"

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I figured I could at least chew on the plastic, but it was nasty. I woulda taken a single tiny candy over that junk any day.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So a carrot's not all so bad, yeah? I'll even let ya
have the leaves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross graciously gives me the carrot top.
It's not much, but it's something.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Tissues?! For what? The bitter tears of defeat?!
choice_data_list: No use crying over spilt milk.
No use crying over spilt milk.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that's true! At least I've got tissues to clean
up the mess with.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Waaait a minute! If I hadn't won such a dud prize,
there'd be nothin' to cry about in da first place!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sigh... I'm so dang unlucky... But that's nothin'
new for me. My life's always been like this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross sulks after losing out at the little
test of luck...
